scripts.dev: concurrently -n main,gateway,m-back,m-front,i-back,i-front,t-back,t-front,d-back,d-front -c cyan,magenta,green,green,yellow,yellow,blue,blue,red,red "npm run dev --prefix frontend/main-app" "npm run dev --prefix backend/api-gateway" "npm run dev --prefix M/career/Career-Bridge/backend" "npm run dev --prefix M/career/Career-Bridge/frontend" "npm run dev --prefix I/Internship-Vacancy-Management/backend" "npm run dev --prefix I/Internship-Vacancy-Management/frontend" "npm run dev --prefix T/backend" "npm run dev --prefix T/frontend" "npm run dev --prefix D/Career-Bridge/backend" "npm run dev --prefix D/Career-Bridge/frontend"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix frontend/main-app && npm install --prefix backend/api-gateway && npm install --prefix M/career/Career-Bridge/backend && npm install --prefix M/career/Career-Bridge/frontend && npm install --prefix I/Internship-Vacancy-Management/backend && npm install --prefix I/Internship-Vacancy-Management/frontend && npm install --prefix T/backend && npm install --prefix T/frontend && npm install --prefix D/Career-Bridge/backend && npm install --prefix D/Career-Bridge/frontend
